name: Tiger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and remove from heat.
2. Measure 1 1/2 cups of crushed sugared cornflakes.
3. Sift together 2 cups of flour, 1 teaspoon baking soda, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
4. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs and vanilla extract to the butter mixture and beat well.
6. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture, mixing thoroughly.
7. Fold in the remaining 1 1/2 cups of crushed sugared cornflakes.
8. Gently swirl melted chocolate into the batter, leaving streaks.
9. Drop dough onto baking sheets or parchment paper.
10. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes. Makes about 5 dozen cookies, each measuring approximately 2 1/2 inches in diameter.
